message:
feat(beads): Expand issue backlog with comprehensive install.sh enhancement roadmap

Import 17 structured issues from PLAN_FOR_NEXT_FEATURES.md, organizing the
install.sh improvement plan into a multi-tier, dependency-aware epic hierarchy.
This expands the Beads issue tracker to cover all planned enhancements for the
installation experience, with proper relationships and priorities.

## New Issues Added

### Epic Structure
- **ultimate_bug_scanner-11**: Complete install.sh Enhancement - All Improvements
  - Master epic coordinating all installation improvements
  - Priority 0 (highest priority)
  - Type: epic

### Tier 1: High-Impact Low-Effort Features (Epic -12)
Parent: -11, Priority: 0
Quick wins focusing on immediate user value with minimal implementation cost.

Features under this epic:
- **-13**: Implement version checking and self-update
  - Status: in_progress, Assignee: claude
  - Add --update flag, check remote VERSION file, auto-update capability

- **-14**: Add comprehensive post-install verification
  - Verify ubs command, test dependencies, run smoke tests, check hooks, validate cache

- **-15**: Implement binary fallback downloads
  - Download ripgrep/ast-grep/jq from GitHub releases when package managers fail

- **-16**: Add WSL detection and optimization
  - Detect WSL environment, handle Windows/Linux hybrid paths

- **-17**: Implement FreeBSD/OpenBSD support
  - Add BSD platform detection, pkg/pkg_add support, BSD-specific optimizations

### Tier 2: Medium-Impact Medium-Effort Features (Epic -18)
Parent: -11, Blocks: -12, Priority: 1
Configuration file support, diagnostic mode, uninstall, more AI tool integration.

Features under this epic:
- **-19**: Add configuration file support
  - Read ~/.config/ubs/install.conf for default settings, --generate-config flag

- **-20**: Implement diagnostic mode
  - Add --diagnose flag: system info, UBS status, dependencies, PATH analysis, hooks

- **-21**: Add clean uninstall support
  - Implement --uninstall flag: remove binary, clean PATH, remove hooks, delete cache

- **-22**: Expand AI tool integration
  - Add support for Aider, Continue, GitHub Copilot, Tabnine, Replit

### Tier 3: Advanced Features (Epic -23)
Parent: -11, Blocks: -18, Priority: 2
Docker support, CI/CD templates, checksum verification, PowerShell installer.

Features under this epic:
- **-24**: Add Docker support
  - Generate Dockerfile, --generate-dockerfile flag, containerized UBS

- **-25**: Implement CI/CD template generation
  - Generate configs for GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, CircleCI with --generate-ci flag

- **-26**: Add checksum verification
  - Verify SHA256 checksums for downloaded binaries, prevent tampering

- **-27**: Create UX polish features
  - Progress bars, spinners, estimated time, contextual help

## Dependency Relationships

The issue hierarchy establishes clear blocking relationships:
- Tier 2 (-18) blocks on completion of Tier 1 (-12)
- Tier 3 (-23) blocks on completion of Tier 2 (-18)
- All tier epics are children of the master epic (-11)
- Individual features are children of their respective tier epics

This ensures work proceeds in logical order: quick wins first, then medium-effort
improvements, then advanced features.

## Technical Implementation Notes

All issues include:
- **Structured metadata**: title, description, status, priority, issue_type
- **Timestamps**: created_at, updated_at (ISO-8601 format)
- **Dependencies**: Explicit parent-child and blocks relationships
- **Creator tracking**: All dependencies created by "daemon" (automated)

Issue -13 (version checking) is marked in_progress with assignee "claude",
indicating active development work has begun on the Tier 1 features.

## Integration with Existing Backlog

These 17 new issues integrate seamlessly with the existing 7 test-suite issues:
- ultimate_bug_scanner-10: Enable python fixtures in manifest
- ultimate_bug_scanner-1x3: Add substring/rule-id assertions
- ultimate_bug_scanner-4ni: Enable python fixtures (in_progress, assignee: codex)
- ultimate_bug_scanner-9dk: Triage UBS findings in repo root
- ultimate_bug_scanner-aqd: Add edge-case fixture thresholds
- ultimate_bug_scanner-d5z: Add manifest coverage for Go/Rust/C++/Java/Ruby
- ultimate_bug_scanner-dmo: Investigate ubs-js file counting bug
- ultimate_bug_scanner-o3l: Wire manifest runner into CI

The total backlog now contains 24 issues spanning test infrastructure, install.sh
enhancements, and module improvements.

## Impact

This commit establishes a clear, prioritized roadmap for install.sh improvements,
enabling:
1. Structured planning with explicit dependencies
2. Parallel work across tiers (within dependency constraints)
3. Progress tracking via Beads status updates
4. Automatic readiness detection (bd ready --json)
5. Git-backed persistence with JSONL format

The roadmap covers the full spectrum from quick wins (WSL detection, BSD support)
to advanced features (Docker support, CI/CD templates), providing a comprehensive
path to production-grade installation experience.

Files changed:
- .beads/beads.base.jsonl: +17 issues (ultimate_bug_scanner-11 through -27)

Related work:
- Roadmap defined in: PLAN_FOR_NEXT_FEATURES.md (commit 5411025)
- Beads infrastructure: commits cb00090, 6eb7a68
- Initial test backlog: commit 6eb7a68 (7 issues)
